RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant CPMC'S Motion For Summary Judgment is denied. California Pacific Medical Center has met its initial burden on the medical malpractice claim to show that its conduct fell within the community standard of care. (Munro v. Regents of University of California (1989) 215 Cal.App.3d 977, 984-85; see Austin Decl., Exhibits L, M.) Ms. Watson had met her shifting burden by coming forward with conflicting expert evidence. (Opp., Friedman Decl.) Summary judgment is denied, there is at least one triable issue of material fact. (CCP 473c(g).) Order signed in open Court.
